name: logo-cloud
description: A band of customer or partner logos — quiet, credibility-building social proof. An optional lead-in over a wrapping row of logos.

heading.description: Lead-in line, e.g. "Trusted by teams everywhere" (h4).

responsive.base: Logos wrap two or three per row.
responsive.lg: Logos in a single centered row.

notes: Each logo image carries the company name as alt text — it is meaningful, not decorative.
Logos are not links unless the brief provides destinations.

elementor.notes: A stack container with a nested wrapping cluster of image widgets.
